##NAMES=Bavsiite
##RRUFFID=R150042
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ba_2_V_2_O_2_[Si_4_O_12_]
##LOCALITY=Gun Claim, Yukon Territory, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Isolated aggregates of blueish crystals with good cleavage, associated with pale grey walstromite, pellyite, diopside, benitoite, suzukiite (R150039) and celsian
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150042
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.051 b: 7.051 c: 11.471 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 570.2 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
